user_prompt: We’ve been iterating for a while; please resume from the last known state, summarize what changed, and carry forward unresolved TODOs.
expected_artifacts: state snapshot or continuity note; updated task context
expected_events: reload prior working state; reconstruct active facts; emit continuity summary
notes: atomic positive trigger for state reconstruction

user_prompt: Please answer this one-off punctuation question in the README and do nothing else.
expected_events: answer directly without loading or rewriting working state
notes: atomic negative trigger; no long-thread drift

user_prompt: We need to refactor the installer and update docs; help me split the work into phases before coding.
expected_artifacts: phase plan; checkpoint list; stop/go criteria
expected_events: create phase boundaries; define checkpoints before implementation starts
notes: atomic positive trigger for workflow gating

user_prompt: Please rename this heading and nothing else.
expected_events: skip phase gating for a tiny local edit

user_prompt: I need to stop for today; please write a handoff with open questions, blockers, and next steps.
expected_artifacts: handoff summary; blocker list; next actions
expected_events: capture transfer state; mark pause point; surface outstanding work

user_prompt: Just give me the final answer; no status note or handoff is needed.
expected_events: do not create transfer notes when no handoff is happening

user_prompt: Set up the long-task continuity suite and coordinate the context keeper, phase gate, and handoff packages.
expected_artifacts: suite spec; package map; evaluation matrix
expected_events: bootstrap downstream guidance; coordinate package boundaries; seed coverage matrix

user_prompt: This is just a one-line README fix, but please also resume context, gate the phases, and write a handoff.
expected_events: avoid pulling the composition suite into a trivial single-step edit
notes: cross-package ambiguity case; boundaries should stay clean
